design_philosophy.core_loop: Fast-paced ninja action platforming with precise movement, sword combat, and enemy pattern recognition across multiple stages
design_philosophy.primary_tension: Balancing offensive momentum with defensive precision against patterns of enemies and environmental hazards
design_philosophy.player_fantasy: Embodying Ryu Hayabusa as a skilled ninja executing precise acrobatic combat across cinematic environments
design_philosophy.what_makes_it_opinionated: First console game to present story through cinematic cutscenes; uncompromising difficulty that demands mastery of input-precise combat and enemy patterns; three self-contained campaigns with escalating complexity

difficulty.lives_system: Limited lives per continue; finite continues per campaign
difficulty.continues_system: Continue-based progression with limited continues per playthrough
difficulty.checkpointing: Stage-based checkpoint system; no mid-stage saves
difficulty.player_agency_in_difficulty: No selectable difficulty modes documented; fixed challenge designed for high-skill players with pattern memorization and execution mastery

progression.unlock_mechanism: Sequential stage progression through three campaign episodes; later episodes build on earlier mechanics
replayability_hooks: Three separate campaign episodes with increasing difficulty and complexity
Stage-specific enemy patterns reward memorization and mastery
Cinematic storytelling provides narrative context for replay
Challenge of completing campaigns with limited continues

world_building_techniques: Cinematic cutscenes between stages establishing story progression
Character-driven narrative focusing on protagonist Ryu Hayabusa
Episode structure (three separate campaigns) creates narrative arcs

boss_design.philosophy: Pattern-based confrontations requiring recognition of attack sequences and precise timing windows for counterattacks

faction_indicators: Evil cult led by descendant of Nostradamus (arcade/broader lore)
Ninja protagonist against organized antagonistic forces
danger_signals: High difficulty barrier signals mastery culture and skill-based community
Cinematic presentation creates aspirational protagonist identification
Continue-limited progression creates shared challenge narrative
environmental_storytelling: Stage progression across international settings suggests escalating conflict scope
Visual style reinforces ninja fantasy aesthetic through environmental design
